rulings.Case Title: OG TREE, INC. VS. OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Relief From Dismissal Pursuant To 473(B); Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 6, 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF OG TREE, INC. MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Relief From Dismissal Pursuant To 473(B) is continued to February 3, 2023 per ex-parte order. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 6, 2023 line 6. DEFENDANT DECORIUS BOGLIN DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on a Notice that expired before August 19, 2022. The Court notes that Plaintiff admits in opposition that mandatory form 1007 has not been served with the 3 Day notice to pay or quit. Any leave to file a supplemental complaint (assuming that Plaintiff properly asked for such leave) based on this notice would be futile. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ALTON MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. TABARI AUSTIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 6, 2023 line 8. DEFENDANT TABARI AUSTIN, KEESHEMAH JOHNSON DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile in good faith allegations in paragraph 6 of the Complaint and in the operative Notice. The Court does not reach the issue of sufficiency of notice Re: Paragraph 19 of the Lease at this time. This issue maybe raised again if proper after the filing of the amended complaint. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
